description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and warped limbs and body parts. The head is visible and somewhat realistic, but the rest of the body is stretched and twisted, with the torso and limbs blending into angular, planar surfaces. The clothing and anatomical features are not clearly defined, and the overall form is fragmented, with sharp edges and irregular geometry. The asset lacks clear details such as facial features, hands, or feet, and the proportions are highly unrealistic. The surface appears to be a mix of matte and slightly glossy textures, with some areas reflecting light more than others.
description: A highly distorted, abstract adult pedestrian figure with a realistic head but warped, angular body and limbs, lacking clear anatomical or clothing details.
description_view_0: The head is most visible, with the body and limbs appearing stretched and twisted into angular planes.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the elongated, warped limbs and the lack of clear anatomical structure.
description_view_2: The head protrudes from the distorted body, with the torso and limbs blending into sharp, irregular surfaces.
description_view_3: The back and side of the figure are visible, showing the abstract, fragmented geometry and lack of clear human form.
attribute_clothing_type: abstracted, unidentifiable clothing with no clear garment type or style
attribute_posture: distorted, twisted posture with limbs and torso unnaturally stretched
